description.ko: 첨단 기술의 마천루와 비에 젖은 네온 거리의 거친 매력이 만나는 거대한 미래 도시의 전경입니다. 홀로그램 디스플레이의 광휘와 디지털 문명의 고동으로 가득 찬 분위기를 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A sprawling futuristic cityscape where high-tech skyscrapers meet the grit of rain-soaked neon streets. The atmosphere is thick with the glow of holographic displays and the pulse of a digital civilization.

prompt: Hyper-realistic cyberpunk city at night, rainy streets reflecting vibrant pink and blue neon lights, massive holographic advertisements flickering above towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban canyons, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, intricate details, synthwave aesthetic, futuristic architecture, sharp focus.
